auth.label: API Key
auth.description: MailboxValidator sends your API key as the key query parameter. Get it from the MailboxValidator dashboard: https://www.mailboxvalidator.com/dashboard.

actions.name: check_disposable_email
actions.description: Check whether an email address belongs to a disposable email provider.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking a disposable email address.

email_address.description: The input email address returned by MailboxValidator.

is_disposable.description: Whether the email address is from a disposable email provider.

credits_available.description: Number of API credits currently available.

actions.name: check_free_email
actions.description: Check whether an email address belongs to a free email provider.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking a free email provider.

email_address.description: The input email address returned by MailboxValidator.

is_free.description: Whether the email address is from a free email provider.

credits_available.description: Number of API credits currently available.

actions.name: validate_email
actions.description: Validate a single email address and return MailboxValidator deliverability signals.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for validating one email address.

email_address.description: The input email address returned by MailboxValidator.

base_email_address.description: The sanitized base email address returned by MailboxValidator.

domain.description: The email domain returned by MailboxValidator.

anyOf.description: MailboxValidator boolean signal, or null when the check is not applicable.

is_syntax.description: Whether the email address syntax is valid.

anyOf.description: MailboxValidator boolean signal, or null when the check is not applicable.

is_dmarc_enforced.description: Whether the email domain enforces DMARC.

is_strict_spf.description: Whether the email domain uses strict SPF.

website_exist.description: Whether the email domain has a reachable website.

mailboxvalidator_score.description: MailboxValidator reputation score for the email address.

time_taken.description: Time taken by MailboxValidator to produce the result, in seconds.

status.description: Whether MailboxValidator considers the email address valid.

credits_available.description: Number of validation credits currently available.
